abstract: This is a GitHub repository called `public-apis` containing 1000+ public APIs across all topics — free, legal, and many require no keys. It enables users to replace paid subscriptions (e.g., Bloomberg Terminal) with open data sources. It is for developers, traders, analysts, and AI agents seeking to build tools, automate routines, and gain informational edges without cost. Outcomes include building functional prototypes in hours, not months, using entirely free data.

source_article.title: 1000+ Free APIs That Will Replace Your Paid Subscriptions
source_article.author: @ManiClones
